MINI MINUTES:

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Appoint Juanita Rusich As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substitute Successor-In-Interest For, Deceased Plaintiff And For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-02-2010 Continued To Mar-08-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 220
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Oren P. Noah, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / moving party
Eugene Brown, Jr., Esq. of FILICE BROWN EASSA & McLEOD (510-444-3131), appearing for defendant / opposing party Tosco Refining Company, Inc.

RULING:
Plaintiff's motion to appoint Juanita Rusich as successor-in-interest to deceased plaintiff and for leave to file first amended complaint. Defendant's objection to plaintiff's insufficient notice of the hearing was heard and granted. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and ordered the hearing continued to March 8, 2010 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 220. Defendant's opposition due today. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Mary Ellen Scherer, CSR #5208
